name: Uncooked Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a bowl and mix well for 2 minutes.
2. Add vanilla extract.
3. In another large bowl, combine oatmeal and coconut.
4. Pour the cocoa mixture over the oatmeal and coconut mixture.
5. Press the mixture into a pan or drop spoonfuls onto waxed paper.
6. Refrigerate until set.
Note: Instead of coconut, you can use 1/2 cup peanut butter.
